name: convallaria
description: Agentic design suite for cultivating quiet brand systems from first feeling to final assets.

interface.shortDescription: Quiet brand craft from first feeling to final assets.
interface.longDescription: Convallaria routes professional design tasks across brand concepting, design-system extraction, image-led logo and icon production, image optimization, token handoff, UI visual QA, and final asset packaging.
defaultPrompt: Use Convallaria to turn this visual reference into a design system.
Use Convallaria to create a brand direction and logo asset plan.
Use Convallaria to optimize and package these design assets.
